next_steps: Image-guided core needle biopsy of the retroperitoneal or mediastinal soft-tissue mass for histopathology
Immunohistochemical staining of biopsy tissue for IgG4 and CD68/CD1a (to evaluate for ECD)
Molecular testing of biopsy tissue for BRAF V600E and other MAPK pathway mutations
PET-CT scan to determine the full extent of disease involvement and metabolic activity
Urgent referral for consultation with rheumatology, oncology, and interventional radiology for tissue acquisition
Consideration of initiation of glucocorticoid therapy pending biopsy results if hemodynamically compromised
